children.name: PlaceOrder
children.purpose: Execute the complete place order workflow: validate, charge, reserve, create record, notify.
children.behavior: Calls validate items, charge payment, reserve inventory, create order record, and send notification in sequence, rolling back on failure.
children.signature: def PlaceOrder(command: str, order_data: dict) -> dict

global_vars.description: Create new order record and update status
Reserve items and update stock counts
Create payment record and charge payment

data_operations.description: Create order record, update status on rollback
Read stock, reserve items, update counts

constraints.description: Must rollback all changes if any step fails
Payment must be charged before inventory is reserved

acceptance_criteria.description: All changes rolled back on failure

children.name: CancelOrder
children.purpose: Execute the complete cancel order workflow: verify, refund, restore inventory, update status.
children.behavior: Calls verify order exists and not shipped, refund payment, restore inventory, update order status to cancelled, rolling back on failure.
children.signature: def CancelOrder(command: str, order_data: dict) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read order status, update to cancelled
Refund payment and update payment status

data_operations.description: Read order, update status to cancelled

constraints.description: Must verify order exists and not shipped before cancelling
Must rollback all changes if any step fails

acceptance_criteria.description: All changes rolled back on failure

children.name: TrackOrder
children.purpose: Return current order status and estimated delivery time.
children.behavior: Queries the orders data store for the given order_id and returns status and estimated delivery time.
children.signature: def TrackOrder(command: str, order_data: dict) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read order status and estimated delivery time

data_operations.description: Read order status and estimated delivery

constraints.description: Must not modify any data stores

acceptance_criteria.description: Returns estimated delivery time if available

governance_notes: Parent global_vars conservation verified: orders (read_write) covered by PlaceOrder and CancelOrder; inventory (read_write) covered by PlaceOrder and CancelOrder; payments (read_write) covered by PlaceOrder and CancelOrder. TrackOrder only reads orders. All parent operations are satisfied with exact op matches. No operations were split or dropped.
